briefdescription.para: Number of columns to process in batch.
Check if column processing is enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, field_name, scalar_value, i_col, j_col, container, rc)
memberdef.name: update_column_diagnostics

briefdescription.para: Update a scalar diagnostic field for column processing.

detaileddescription.para: This method handles updating scalar diagnostic values from column processing to the global diagnostic storage managed by DiagnosticManager.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the diagnostic field to update

memberdef.argsstring: (this, field_name, array_1d, i_col, j_col, container, rc)
memberdef.name: update_column_diagnostics

briefdescription.para: Update a 1D diagnostic field for column processing.

detaileddescription.para: This method handles updating 1D diagnostic arrays (e.g., vertical profiles) from column processing to the global diagnostic storage.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the diagnostic field to update

memberdef.argsstring: (this, field_name, array_2d, i_col, j_col, container, rc)
memberdef.name: update_column_diagnostics

briefdescription.para: Update a 2D diagnostic field for column processing.

detaileddescription.para: This method handles updating 2D diagnostic arrays (e.g., level-species matrices) from column processing to the global diagnostic storage. Since DiagnosticInterface currently supports up to 3D arrays, 2D column data is stored using flattened indexing.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the diagnostic field to update

memberdef.argsstring: (this, field_name, scalar_value, i_col, j_col, container, rc)
memberdef.name: update_scalar_diagnostic_column

briefdescription.para: Update a scalar diagnostic field for column processing.

detaileddescription.para: This method handles updating scalar diagnostic values from column processing to the global diagnostic storage managed by DiagnosticManager.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the diagnostic field to update

memberdef.argsstring: (this, field_name, array_1d, i_col, j_col, container, rc)
memberdef.name: update_1d_diagnostic_column

briefdescription.para: Update a 1D diagnostic field for column processing.

detaileddescription.para: This method handles updating 1D diagnostic arrays (e.g., vertical profiles) from column processing to the global diagnostic storage.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the diagnostic field to update

memberdef.argsstring: (this, field_name, array_2d, i_col, j_col, container, rc)
memberdef.name: update_2d_diagnostic_column

briefdescription.para: Update a 2D diagnostic field for column processing.

detaileddescription.para: This method handles updating 2D diagnostic arrays (e.g., level-species matrices) from column processing to the global diagnostic storage. Since DiagnosticInterface currently supports up to 3D arrays, 2D column data is stored using flattened indexing.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the diagnostic field to update

briefdescription.para: Enhanced process interface specifically for column-based processing.

detaileddescription.para: This interface extends ProcessInterface to provide column virtualization capabilities, allowing processes to work with virtual columns while maintaining awareness of 3D spatial relationships.
